task_completion.description: Verify that the New Mexico scouting bookmarks have been organized into the expected folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) or the Bookmarks Bar. You should see exactly these folders: 'Permitting', 'Locations', 'Weather & Maps', and 'Equipment & Crew'.

task_completion.description: Verify that irrelevant bookmarks from the previous Georgia shoot and personal sites have been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Manager. Ensure there are NO bookmarks linking to georgia.org, atlantaga.gov, netflix.com, espn.com, reddit.com, or twitter.com.

task_completion.description: Verify that global location access is enabled in Chrome settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site Settings > Location (chrome://settings/content/location). The option 'Sites can ask for your location' should be selected, or the specific allowed sites (earthengine.google.com, suncalc.org) should be explicitly listed under 'Allowed to use your location'.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom search engines for maps and weather have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search (chrome://settings/searchEngines). Under 'Site search', there should be entries with the shortcuts 'map' (pointing to google.com/maps) and 'wx' (pointing to weather.com).

task_completion.description: Verify that the startup pages are configured to the specific production URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > On startup (chrome://settings/onStartup). The option 'Open a specific page or set of pages' must be selected, with 'https://nmfilm.com/' and 'https://www.suncalc.org/' listed as the pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that automated downloads are routed to the production folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > Downloads (chrome://settings/downloads). The 'Location' path must end in 'Desert_Mirage_Production' (e.g., /home/ga/Documents/Desert_Mirage_Production) AND the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned OFF.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through Chrome's settings menus and bookmark manager, rather than just using a terminal to edit the Chrome 'Preferences' JSON file or SQLite databases directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Google Chrome or Chromium browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Chrome browser UI (address bar, tabs, settings layout) rather than a text editor or a mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not run an automated script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the execution of bash or python scripts designed to inject bookmarks or modify browser settings automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Banned domains to be removed: georgia.org, atlantaga.gov, netflix.com, espn.com, reddit.com, twitter.com. Expected bookmark folders: 'Permitting', 'Locations', 'Weather & Maps', 'Equipment & Crew'. Startup URLs: https://nmfilm.com/, https://www.suncalc.org/. Download directory: Desert_Mirage_Production (specifically /home/ga/Documents/Desert_Mirage_Production). Custom search engines: shortcut 'map' (https://www.google.com/maps/search/%s) and shortcut 'wx' (https://weather.com/weather/today/l/%s). Allowed location sites: https://earthengine.google.com:443, https://www.suncalc.org:443.
